meta.title: AdNexus AI — Advertising Intelligence Platform
meta.description: AI-powered advertising campaign management, optimization, and analytics platform.
meta.keywords: advertising, AI, campaign management, marketing, analytics

common.name: Name
common.placeholder: Chart component placeholder — integrate recharts here
common.noDataHint: There is nothing to show yet.

auth.name: Full Name
auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to your AdNexus AI account
auth.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least {min} characters
auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password
auth.resetEmailSentDescription: If an account exists for that email address, we've sent a password reset link. The link expires in 1 hour.
auth.resetRequestFailed: Could not send the reset email. Please try again.
auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Enter a new password for your account
auth.resetPasswordSuccessDescription: Your password has been updated. You can now sign in with your new password.
auth.resetPasswordFailed: Password reset failed. Please try again.
auth.invalidResetTokenDescription: This password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
auth.acceptInviteSubtitle: Create your account to join the workspace
auth.acceptInviteFailed: Could not accept the invitation. The link may be invalid or expired.
auth.acceptInviteSuccessDescription: Your account is ready. Sign in to open the dashboard.
auth.invalidInviteTokenDescription: This invitation link is invalid or has expired. Ask your workspace admin to send a new invite.
auth.verifyEmailDescription: Click below to confirm your email address.
auth.verifyEmailMissingTokenDescription: Enter your email address and we'll send a fresh verification link.
auth.verifyEmailSignupDescription: We sent a verification link to {email}. You can keep exploring now, but billing and platform connections require verification.
auth.verifyEmailSuccessDescription: Your email has been verified. You can now connect ad platforms and manage billing.
auth.verifyEmailFailed: Email verification failed. Please request a new link.
auth.resendVerificationFailed: Could not send the verification email. Please try again.
auth.resendVerificationSuccess: If that account exists and is unverified, we've sent a verification email.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.performanceDescription: Campaign performance over the last 30 days
dashboard.emptyDescription: Connect an ad account and sync to see your performance here.
dashboard.firstValueTitle: Get to your first useful dashboard
dashboard.firstValueDescription: Connect Meta, sync campaigns, then review a real insight. We will not show pretend KPI data while your workspace is empty.
dashboard.connectMetaDescription: Start with Meta Ads so AdNexus can import live campaign performance through OAuth.
dashboard.syncFirstAccountDescription: After OAuth, import campaigns and today's metrics before looking at dashboard KPIs.
dashboard.viewFirstInsightDescription: Once synced, the dashboard will show real KPIs plus a recommended action.
dashboard.syncNoConnectedAccount: No connected ad account to sync
dashboard.syncFailed: Sync failed. Check OAuth scopes and platform configuration, then try again.
dashboard.syncErrorDescription: The latest sync could not import campaigns. Reconnect the account if OAuth expired, or verify API credentials and scopes.
dashboard.partialSyncDescription: Imported {count} campaigns, but some data failed. Review sync history in Integrations before trusting all KPIs.
dashboard.dataFreshnessUnknown: Data freshness: no completed sync recorded
dashboard.insightNoSpend: Campaigns are synced, but spend is currently zero for the imported window.
dashboard.insightRoas: Average ROAS is {roas}x across synced campaigns.
dashboard.insightCpa: Average CPA is {cpa} across synced campaigns.
dashboard.insightMonitor: Campaigns are synced. Review spend, click, and conversion trends before making changes.
dashboard.recommendedActionRoas: Recommended action: inspect campaigns below 1.5x ROAS and draft budget reductions before scaling spend.
dashboard.recommendedActionCtr: Recommended action: refresh low-CTR creatives before increasing budget.
dashboard.recommendedActionReview: Recommended action: open campaigns to review top movers and create a draft optimization.
dashboard.commandCenterDescription: Your daily operating view for account health, data freshness, approvals, alerts, and the next best action.
dashboard.accountHealthDescription: A practical readiness check before you act on campaign performance.
dashboard.nextBestActionDescription: The most useful thing to do now, based only on available data.
dashboard.nbaCriticalAlertsDescription: {count} critical alert(s) are active. Review them before making optimization changes.
dashboard.nbaDraftsDescription: {count} draft(s) are waiting for human approval before anything changes live spend.
dashboard.nbaRecommendationsDescription: {count} recommendation(s) are ready to inspect and convert into safe draft actions.
dashboard.nbaSyncDescription: {count} account(s) have stale or missing sync data. Refresh before trusting KPIs.
dashboard.nbaEmptyDescription: No pending approvals, critical alerts, or recommendations are currently available. Review campaign trends or create a new optimization draft.
dashboard.pendingApprovalsDescription: Draft-first changes that still need a human decision.
dashboard.noPendingApprovalsDescription: When the AI or your team creates draft changes, they will appear here before execution.
dashboard.alertsSummaryDescription: Active rules and unread operational notifications.
dashboard.noActiveAlertsDescription: Alert rules and unread notifications are quiet right now.
dashboard.recommendationsDescription: Pending AI suggestions from the existing agent workflow.
dashboard.noRecommendationsDescription: The agent will surface recommendations after enough campaign data is synced.
dashboard.dataFreshnessDescription: Connected account sync status from existing integrations.
dashboard.connectForFreshness: Connect and sync an ad account to unlock freshness checks.

campaigns.title: Campaigns
campaigns.description: Manage and optimize your advertising campaigns.
campaigns.basicInfo: Enter the basic information for your campaign
campaigns.platformCannotChange: Platform cannot be changed after creation
campaigns.adsPlaceholder: Ads will appear here once created
campaigns.noConnectedAccount: No connected ad account for this platform.
campaigns.deleteCampaignDescription: Are you sure you want to delete “{name}”? This action cannot be undone.

drafts.title: Drafts
drafts.description: Review and approve optimization drafts. V1 pilot approvals do not write to ad platforms yet.
drafts.failedToExecute: Platform execution is disabled for the v1 pilot. Approval records review intent only; no ad platform changes were applied.
drafts.executionNotice: Reviewing a draft only marks it approved. Platform execution is disabled for the v1 pilot, so no live campaign writes happen from this screen.
drafts.executionDisabled: Platform execution is disabled for the v1 pilot. Approval records review intent only; no ad platform changes are applied.

aiAgent.title: AI Operator
aiAgent.description: Draft-first recommendations for safer campaign optimization.
aiAgent.guardrailDescription: Recommendations are advisory. Applying one creates a draft in the approval queue; nothing is published until an owner, admin, or editor approves and executes it.
aiAgent.recommendationsPlaceholder: The operator only shows real recommendations from connected campaign data. Connect an ad platform, define goals, and keep rules active to start seeing opportunities here.
aiAgent.noDraftApprovalsDescription: Drafts created from recommendations will appear here and in the Drafts queue for approval and execution.
aiAgent.insightsDescription: AI-generated analysis of your account performance
aiAgent.revenueOpportunityDesc: You could increase revenue by 23% by implementing the top 5 budget recommendations.
aiAgent.creativeFatigueDesc: 3 campaigns show signs of creative fatigue. Consider refreshing creatives within 7 days.
aiAgent.audienceOptimizationDesc: Your audience targeting is performing 15% above industry benchmark.
aiAgent.notificationPreferencesDesc: Choose how you want to be notified about new recommendations
aiAgent.analysisFrequencyDesc: How often the AI Agent analyzes your campaigns
aiAgent.excludedCampaignsDesc: Campaigns to exclude from AI recommendations
aiAgent.chatDescription: Get advisory answers grounded in your current recommendations.
aiAgent.chatGuardrailNote: Chat is advisory only. To act on a suggestion, use Draft for approval on the Recommendations tab — nothing publishes without review.
aiAgent.chatEmpty: Ask about campaign performance, priorities, or what to optimize next.

reports.title: Reports

performanceSummary.name: Performance Summary
performanceSummary.description: High-level KPIs across all campaigns: spend, impressions, clicks, conversions, ROAS.

campaignComparison.name: Campaign Comparison
campaignComparison.description: Side-by-side comparison of up to 5 campaigns with normalized metrics.

spendBreakdown.name: Spend Breakdown
spendBreakdown.description: Daily spend tracking with budget pacing and forecast.

audienceInsights.name: Audience Insights
audienceInsights.description: Demographics, interests, and behavior analysis of converting audiences.

reports.concept: Concept: Drag-and-drop report builder with chart widgets, date range picker, and export options (PDF, CSV, PNG).

settings.title: Settings
settings.inviteDescription: Send a workspace invitation with the right access level.
settings.inviteSuccess: Invitation created and the team list has been refreshed.
settings.notificationDescription: Choose what you want to be notified about
settings.newApiKey: New API Key created — copy it now:
settings.copyApiKeyWarning: This is the only time the full key will be shown.
settings.copyFailed: Copy failed. Select and copy the key manually.
settings.apiKeysPlaceholder: Generate an API key to access the AdNexus API programmatically.
settings.removeMemberDescription: Are you sure you want to remove {name} from this workspace? They will immediately lose access.
settings.revokeApiKeyDescription: Are you sure you want to revoke the API key “{name}”? Any applications using this key will stop working immediately.

billing.title: Billing
billing.checkoutUnavailableDescription: Billing checkout has not been configured yet. Your current plan and usage are shown without fake upgrade options.
billing.checkoutReadyDescription: Checkout is configured and will open Stripe securely for the selected paid plan.
billing.downgradeToFree: Downgrade to free at period end
billing.planChangeScheduled: Your subscription will move to {plan} at the end of the current billing period.
billing.usageEndpointDeferred: Usage totals are shown from your billing summary while metering rolls out.
billing.usageEndpointDeferredDetail: The dedicated usage endpoint is not available yet. Period totals below use your last synced billing state.
billing.usageBreakdownDeferred: Per-feature usage breakdown is coming soon. Period totals below are accurate for your current plan limits.
billing.invoicesPlaceholder: Invoices will appear here once you have a paid subscription
billing.portalUnavailable: Billing portal is unavailable until a Stripe customer is connected for this workspace.

alerts.title: Alerts
alerts.alertRulesDescription: Configured monitoring rules and their status
alerts.ruleBuilderPlaceholder: IF metric X operator threshold THEN notify via [Email | Slack | In-App]
alerts.concept: Concept: Visual rule builder with metric picker, threshold slider, notification channel selector, and cooldown settings.

audiences.title: Audiences
audiences.audienceSegmentsDescription: Your saved and custom audiences across platforms
audiences.concept: Concept: Visual audience builder with demographic filters, interest trees, custom event rules, and real-time size estimation.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Connect your advertising platforms and tools.

sync.noAccount: No connected ad account to sync

integrations.oauthIssueDescription: This account is marked {status}. Reconnect it to refresh OAuth permissions before syncing.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.description: Configure outgoing webhooks for event notifications.
webhooks.emptyDescription: Create a webhook to receive real-time events.

errors.unexpectedErrorDescription: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

onboarding.title: Welcome to AdNexus AI
onboarding.description: Let's get your workspace set up in a few steps.
onboarding.stepConnectDesc: Connect Meta for launch-ready execution. Google is read-only in v1; TikTok and Snap are mock-ready only until live OAuth and sync are completed.
onboarding.stepTeamDesc: Add teammates to collaborate on campaigns.
onboarding.stepCampaignDesc: Open the dashboard after your first sync to review real KPIs and the recommended action.
onboarding.finishLockedDescription: Connect an account and sync at least one campaign before marking onboarding complete. You can still skip for now and continue from the dashboard.
onboarding.completeBlocked: Complete onboarding after connecting an ad account and syncing at least one campaign.
onboarding.stepFirstValueDesc: Open the dashboard after your first sync to review real KPIs and the recommended action.

goals.title: Goals
goals.emptyDescription: Create a goal to track ROAS, CPA, conversions and more.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Cross-campaign performance metrics and trends for your workspace.
analytics.emptyDescription: Connect ad accounts and create campaigns to see performance metrics here.
analytics.spendTrendDescription: Daily spend and conversions across active campaigns.

auditLog.title: Audit Log
auditLog.description: A record of every change in your workspace.
auditLog.emptyFilteredDescription: Try clearing or changing the audit log filters.
